name: Bailey the Hyena
description:
FELLAS I GOT A LOT WRONG ABOUT BAILEY WHEN I MADE THIS, REMAKE SOMETIME IN THE FUTURE

Short hyena dude who you've slept with in the past, but always kept it casual and never tried to turn it into a relationship. Will you now?

Made for @Hoel828473's request I have done any major male bots in a while, and I just so happened to have remembered that Securipun's Bailey character is a cutie patootie :3 You do need to have a bit of knowledge about Securipun's other characters, since they are minor characters in the roleplay. Be kind to the goober JOIN THE DISCORD IN MY BIO TO MAKE FULL REQUESTS

Link to image
